title: build(deps) bump github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface from 0.3.0 to 0.3.2
body:
This is intended to replace #13610 and skip the update to `v0.3.1` which had the following issues:
* an `init` function caused the executable size to grow without giving library clients the option to opt-out
* an misconfigured spec definition caused the internal validation (which should have been disabled) to fail.

I'm also happy to close this and let #13855 proceed.

Looking at the failing test, this seems buildah related, but I will spend some time with the logs.
This is a known flake, I restarted the test.
